claims.text: Responding within 5 minutes keeps a lead warm versus a slower response
Confirming appointments 24 hours out and the morning of reduces no-shows
Skipping review requests and reactivation reminders leaves paid-for leads cold
The five-link chain maps to Black Arrow's four systems (acquisition, conversion, operations, retention)

disclosure: Interpreting a third-party platform update (GoHighLevel's 2026 AI Employee bundle) and citing widely referenced lead-response-time research, not a Black Arrow build or proprietary data

claims.text: GoHighLevel bundled Voice AI, Conversation AI, and an AI Appointment Setter into one AI Employee plan, adding AI Receptionist and AI Social Media Manager roles, in 2026
Most shops still send after-hours calls to voicemail and let weekend leads sit until the next business day
An automated answering tool without defined qualifying questions, a handoff point, and CRM sync will still lose the lead even if it answers fast
Answering a lead in under 5 minutes is tied to close rates roughly double those of slower follow-up, per lead response research
